Phone call (2:00)
Summary: Customer called asking about Wash and Wax product availability and sizing. Discussed the sixteen ounce and one gallon options. Customer asked about dilution instructions and requested product link via text.
Auto-quote Q-0048 generated after phone call: Express Interior Clean
Hi I need my car detailed

Hey there! I'd be happy to help you get your car detailed! 

What type of vehicle do you have - sedan, SUV/truck, or van? And what's the make and model?
20202 Honda civic silver

Perfect! A 2020 Honda Civic in silver - nice ride! 

What kind of detailing are you looking for? Something quick like an express wash, or a more thorough detail?
I don't have too much money right now what are your deals

I totally get it! For your Civic, our most budget-friendly options are:

Express Exterior Wash - $75 (45 min)
Express Interior Clean - $85 (45 min)

Both are mobile services, so we come to you. What sounds good?
The express exterior is perfect

Awesome! Express Exterior Wash for your 2020 Honda Civic - $75. We'll come to you and get it looking great in about 45 minutes.

What's your name so I can get this set up for you?
Naveed

Perfect, Naveed! I'll put together a quote for the Express Exterior Wash on your 2020 Honda Civic. One moment!

View your quote: https://frederic-intratelluric-rosalyn.ngrok-free.dev/s/bUVI0g
Conversation closed by Nayeem Khan
Conversation reopened — customer re-engaged
How much for the the upgrade detail

Hey Naveed! Good to hear from you again! 

For your Honda Civic, the next step up would be our Signature Complete Detail at $210. That's a full interior and exterior detail that takes 3-5 hours - much more thorough than the express wash.

Is that what you're looking for?
Yea but when can we schedule this

Perfect! Since you're ready to book the Signature Complete Detail for your Civic, here's the booking link:

https://smartdetailsautospa.com//book

You can pick your preferred date and time right there. The service is $210 and takes 3-5 hours. We come to you since it's mobile!
Can I add some products to my order

Absolutely! We have auto care products available too. 

What kind of products are you looking for? Things like car wash soap, wax, interior cleaners, or something specific?
Give me a list of your wax products

I don't have our current product inventory with me right now. For the best selection and pricing on wax products, I'd recommend having one of our team members follow up with you - they'll have the full product catalog.

Want to stick with just the Signature Detail for now, or would you like someone to call you about p…
your car need a detailed wash....i know it...I've been watching you and know how messy you keep your vehicle!!!
Hey Segundo! Just checking if you had a chance to look at your quote: https://staging.smartdetailsautospa.com/s/MzM9Sb
Auto-quote Q-0057 generated after phone call: Signature Complete Detail, RV Interior Clean, RV Exterior Wash, Complete Motorcycle Detail
What kind of wax products do you have?

Phone call
Summary: Nayeem inquired about the price for an exterior wash for his new 2025 black Chevrolet Camaro. The agent provided the price for an "Express Exterior Wash" at $75, which includes a premium foam wash, wheel and tire cleaning, window streak-free finish, and tire dressing. Nayeem decided to check his schedule and call back to book, and the agent confirmed that pricing details would be sent. The conversation concluded with the user planning to follow up.

Phone call
Summary: The agent welcomed Nayeem back to Smart Details and began to address a specific topic, which was cut off.
Here's your quote from Smart Details Auto Spa for Express Exterior Wash, Signature Complete Detail, 1-Year Ceramic Shield, 5-Year Ceramic Shield Plus: https://staging.smartdetailsautospa.com/s/6y8Kl4
Browse our Brushes at Smart Details Auto Spa: https://staging.smartdetailsautospa.com/s/CBg890
I turned off AI for your phone. Try it again.
Do you have any wax products?
I'm wondering what kind of wax products you have

Here are our wax and paint protection products:

**Bead Maker Paint Protection** - $19.94 (16oz) - Makes paint protection easier and faster than ever

**Carnauba Paste Wax** - $28.99 (19oz) - Blue carnauba paste wax that deposits a rich, deep finish

**Cherry Speed Wax** - $18.79 (16oz) - Quick application wax

You can browse our full product catalog online: https://frederic-intratelluric-rosalyn.ngrok-free.dev/products

Or visit us in-store to see everything in person!

Phone call (2:00)
Summary: Naim Khan called to inquire about detailing services for his 2016 Honda Accord Coupe. He was quoted a price for the Signature Complete Detail and asked to have the information texted to him.
Thanks

Hey Segundo! Good to hear from you again 👋

What can I help you with today? Looking to book another detail or need something different?
I don't know

No worries! Let me help you figure it out.

Are you looking for car detailing services, or maybe some products for your vehicle?

Or if you're not sure what your car needs right now, I'm happy to make a suggestion based on what might work best!
Okay, thanks

Since it's been a while since your last detail, your car could probably use some attention!

Would you like to book another exterior wash like last time, or are you thinking about a more complete detail (interior + exterior)?
Yeah, sure

Great! Just to clarify - are you interested in:

1. Another Express Exterior Wash (like you had before)
2. Or a complete detail that includes interior cleaning too?

Which sounds better to you?
How much for a full detail ?

For a complete detail, our Signature Complete Detail runs $210-320 depending on your vehicle size. It includes full exterior wash + complete interior cleaning and takes 3-5 hours.

What kind of vehicle would this be for? (sedan, SUV, truck, etc.)
Sedan

Perfect! For your sedan, the Signature Complete Detail would be $210. 

This includes complete exterior wash + full interior cleaning and conditioning - takes about 3-5 hours and we come to you.

Sound good? I can get you set up with a quote to book!
Book it for tomorrow at 10 am

Sounds great! I'll put together a quote for the Signature Complete Detail on your sedan for tomorrow at 10am. One moment!

View your quote: https://frederic-intratelluric-rosalyn.ngrok-free.dev/s/GZ46Hp
Thanks

You're welcome! Your quote is all set.

Once you complete the booking through that link, you'll be all confirmed for tomorrow at 10am. We'll come to you and have your sedan looking amazing!

Anything else I can help with today?
No thanks

Perfect! Thanks Segundo - looking forward to detailing your sedan tomorrow at 10am.

Have a great rest of your day! 👍
Awesome! See you tomorrow! 🚗✨
